bucket.examine: Appears to be some kind of blueprint for a boat part.
A rusty old locket that's sealed shut.
A mouldy wooden block that might have once been part of a toy.
A dull knife that was presumably once used for food preparation.
A long-broken compass. It doesn't point anywhere now.
A rusty coin with some strange markings on it.
A long-broken sextant that would have been used to navigate the seas.
A mouldy doll that was presumably once the property of a child.
A small broken mirror. It doesn't reflect much now.
An elegant feather from an albatross. Not so swift anymore.
Be careful with this! It's unstable!
A special salt used by experienced hunters to remove their sent[sic] from traps.

I wonder what happens if I rub it...

The tentacle of an armoured kraken.
Bones blessed at an exposed altar.
Bones blessed at an exposed altar.
Light reading.
Gives a new meaning to blind drunk.
Crew, clear the deck, it's time for me to sample this unknown liquid alone.
Seems to be very heavy on the banana. 100% of your daily recommended amount.
If your banker drinks this, seek independent financial advice immediately.
The bottle promises a wave of freshness when drunk.
The lobster inside looks like a shell of its former self.

bucket.page_name: Bottle of captain cat's black rum
bucket.examine: Will keep you ready for work at all hours.
bucket.item_name: Bottle of captain cat's black rum

bucket.page_name: Bottle of captain clop's mango gin
bucket.examine: There is a picture of a centaur on the bottle with four peg legs.
bucket.item_name: Bottle of captain clop's mango gin

bucket.examine: A cocktail in everyone's favourite flavour: blue.
Recommended by 9/10 emotionally repressed actors.
You can see straight through it, but you don't know for how much longer.
Flecks of shiny crystal can be seen in the water.
Do real wine tasters consume the whole bottle in one swig?
A cocktail in everyone's favourite flavour: red.
This beer has an interesting bouquet that is completely imperceptible to humans.

bucket.page_name: Bottle of dwarvern wizard's stout bomb
bucket.examine: Will blow your tiny little mind.
bucket.item_name: Bottle of dwarvern wizard's stout bomb

bucket.examine: Looks like normal water, but if this journey has taught you anything, its that you shouldn't trust a floating sealed crate full of bottles of drink.
This drink was previously known as go-awade.
25% the bottle size, 200% the punch.
The process for getting more bladder into stout is patent pending.
If you don't lick your lips, the tonic will for you.

bucket.page_name: Bottle of get to the point punch
bucket.examine: This drink looks like it is formulated for ogre stomachs. Perhaps just take a little sip this time.
bucket.item_name: Bottle of get to the point punch

bucket.examine: Who pickpockets a drink? Do drinks have pockets? Did they wash their hands?
Please collect corpse parts in one location before reviving.

bucket.page_name: Bottle of headless unicornman's heady beer
bucket.examine: Will have you foaming at the neck hole.
bucket.item_name: Bottle of headless unicornman's heady beer

bucket.examine: Which will you get? Collect them all!

bucket.page_name: Bottle of kgp standard issue martini
bucket.examine: Neither shaken, nor stirred, but rolled down a hill in a snowball.
bucket.item_name: Bottle of kgp standard issue martini

bucket.examine: Best served chilled. Unfortunate that you found this in a tropical ocean then.

bucket.page_name: Bottle of light in the dark
bucket.examine: Warnings on the bottle read: Flammable, inflammable, unstable, incendary, combustable, explosive. Best served in a low oxygen environment.
bucket.item_name: Bottle of light in the dark

bucket.examine: Will put hairs on your hairs' hairs.
Somehow specifying the fish makes it sound worse.
Made with 100% mystery fruit.
Guaranteed to be more dangerous than any spirit it is paired with.
Noted ogre herbalists formulated this potion from strong beer, snake tails and rancid weeds.

bucket.page_name: Bottle of ol' random's reddest rum
bucket.examine: Apparently no bottle of this rum is the same. That is an impressive upsell of poor quality control.
bucket.item_name: Bottle of ol' random's reddest rum

bucket.examine: The bottle is warm. It was apparently bottled in a renowned hot spring, hopefully before anyone bathed in it.
Over twice as shiny as Asgoldian ale!
You'll be going places with this drink!
If it looks like egg whites, and quacks like egg whites, its probably duck egg whites.
There is a picture of an old woman on the bottle who looks to be older than time itself.
Like a pub quiz without the pub!
Who is Robert and why does he have his own port? We will never know.
An improvement on an original recipe. A true classic.
Danger, drink under pressure. Wear protective equipment when opening.
Perfect for when you have no one to share your achievements with.

bucket.page_name: Bottle of slippery snake skins in possibly gravy
bucket.examine: Trying to work out why someone would make this could be as mentally damaging as drinking it.
bucket.item_name: Bottle of slippery snake skins in possibly gravy

bucket.examine: The label boasts an improved formula with 30% extra slug.
100% juice, never from consecrate.
The bottle boasts being the soul of de-party'd.
Despite its name, has a cork rather than a screw top.
Bottle not actual compass. Do not try to detect any fields, magnetic or otherwise whilst under the effect of this drink.
Implies something horrible about standard cola.

bucket.page_name: Bottle of tangled toad's legs cider
bucket.examine: Six times more intoxicating than licking the toad raw.
bucket.item_name: Bottle of tangled toad's legs cider

I'm tired and I want to go to bed.

Now with extra woad for a more blue flavour.

Do not share with wildlife.
Will warm you up on the coldest nights.

Intoxication guaranteed.
